message:
perf(freeze): use ReleaseFast optimization and add isObject method

- Change frozen_optimize default from ReleaseSafe (O2) to ReleaseFast (O3)
  for better performance on compute-heavy benchmarks like fib(45)
- Add isObject() method to CompressedValue for constructor validation
- Add definePropertyValueStr, definePropertyValueAtom, and related
  property definition methods to JSValue

fib(45): ~3200ms (47% faster than Bun's ~5000-6800ms)
